results.title: More than 15 regional artists inspired by 15 poets in Reverse Ekphrasis Exhibit at RBG
results.description: Along the beautiful Allegheny River in Foxburg — where nature, music and art meet — the Red Brick Gallery (RBG) invites audiences into a unique exhibition celebrating the shared vision and mutual inspiration of regional poets and visual artists in...

results.title: LEGO Minecraft 21591 The Twisted Warden Battle revealed!
results.description: A couple of Minecraft Dungeons sets arrived in 2020 and 2021 and another, based on the upcoming Minecraft Dungeons II, has been announced today! 21591 The Twisted Warden Battle contains 438 pieces and four new characters from the game, Kellen, Ren, Flores and Valorie, plus the titular warden. The set will be released on August 1st, costing £44.99, $59.99 or €49.99. More images are available below... Continue reading » © 2026 Brickset.com .
